clinical_criteria: Multivariable logistic regression score ≥ 8 (~80% sensitivity and specificity)
≥2 occurrences of non-atherosclerotic PAD codes for exclusion
algorithm_summary: The PAD phenotype algorithm uses a multi-tiered approach: 1) Gold standard based on vascular lab ABI measurements (ABI ≤0.90 or poorly compressible arteries with ABI >1.4 or ankle BP >255mmHg), 2) ICD-9-CM diagnosis codes for PAD (440.2x, 440.3x, 440.8x), 3) Procedure codes for lower extremity interventions with exclusions, 4) Billing code-based logistic regression model with 14 variables achieving AUROC of 0.86, using a score threshold of 8 for ~80% sensitivity/specificity. The algorithm excludes non-atherosclerotic causes and trauma-related conditions. Patients are classified as 'definite' PAD if meeting vascular lab criteria plus ≥2 related codes, or 'probable' PAD if meeting any one related code.
